name: Mana
description: Square Enix action RPG series known in Japan as Seiken Densetsu, centered on fantasy worlds, the Mana Tree, real-time combat, and standalone adventures.

eras.title: Seiken Densetsu Era
eras.description: The original Square era establishes Mana through Final Fantasy Adventure, Secret of Mana, and Trials of Mana.

eras.title: Experimental Era
eras.description: Legend of Mana and the World of Mana projects expand the series through experimental structure, spin-offs, and mixed reception.

eras.title: Revival Era
eras.description: Modern remakes, collections, and new releases revive the Mana series for current platforms.
